seed_problem: Assign frequencies to transmitters minimizing total interference conflicts under a channel budget; checker scores baseline_conflicts/achieved.
mutation: composite: generalize the plain graph-coloring conflict count to a weighted co-channel + adjacent-channel interference penalty over a fixed channel budget K (minimum-interference frequency assignment), on instances whose chromatic number exceeds K so zero-conflict is impossible and greedy vs. local-search strategies diverge.
title: Static Cascade: Debris-Collector Channel Assignment
strategies: all-on-one-channel baseline: assign every collector channel 1 (pays every co-channel penalty)
sequential greedy: color collectors in index order, each taking the channel that minimizes conflict with already-assigned neighbors
min-conflicts local search: greedy init then repeatedly reassign the worst collector to its least-conflicting channel until convergence
saturation/degree-ordered coloring with tie-breaking, optionally restarted from perturbed seeds
